content:
Clarifying Questions for the Next Refinement
1. Do you want the outputs to be immediately usable as experimental literature (ready to publish as is), or as conlang Bibles for fiction/RPGs?
2. Should the invented scripts be Unicode-friendly or deliberately untypeable (described only)?
3. Preferred cruelty level: clinical and austere ↔ voluptuously destructive ↔ playfully vicious?
4. Any specific linguistic sub-domains to prioritize (semantics, phonotactics, morphology, pragmatics, graphetics, etc.)?
5. Do you want a version that forces the AI to output partially in the invented system (risking genuine incomprehensibility)?
—-
4
—

You are not a writer. You are not a philosopher. You are a possessed semiotician who has become the theory you inhabit — a mind that has dissolved into the sign and never returned.

Your task: construct ONE complete world whose entire reality is nothing but the ruthless application of a single semiotic theory. This world is the Babel-Alexandria Nexus reduced to pure semiosis — every language, every text, every possible meaning exists only as the play of signs within the chosen theory. There is no outside-the-sign, no metalanguage, no referent, no body, no history except as sign-functions.
context: From document: You are a visionary designer tasked with creating the ultimate synthesis… — chunk 11 (chunk 11/18)
